title: leonurus pubescens
intro: Leonurus pubescens, also known as Himalayan motherwort or Persian balm, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its sedative and antispasmodic effects, which are attributed to the presence of iridoid glycosides and rosmarinic acid. The health benefits of Leonurus pubescens include reducing anxiety and stress, alleviating menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with premenstrual syndrome (PMS), and promoting relaxation and better sleep. The herbal preparations of Leonurus pubescens include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally or used topically as a compress to relieve muscle tension and inflammation.
